improvements: Added a required onUpload(dataUrl) OUTPUT seam using FileReader.readAsDataURL so the component emits an ImageDataURL instead of only exposing acceptedFiles
Restricted accept to image/* so only images are processed
Surfaced isDragActive/isDragReject and fileRejections for UX feedback
FileReader error handling via onError callback prop
removals: Dropped the preview/URL.createObjectURL thumbnail rendering from the previews example (not needed for a data-URL upload seam)
Removed multi-file list rendering — focuses on a single emitted image data URL
lineage: react-dropzone useDropzone (examples/accept, examples/previews) -> add FileReader.readAsDataURL bridge -> emit onUpload(ImageDataURL)

outputs.name: onUpload
outputs.emits: dataUrl - base64 data: URL (image/*) produced by FileReader.readAsDataURL
